name: Consensus Cloud Solutions Inc. Common Stock
summary: Consensus Cloud Solutions, Inc. provides digital cloud fax technology and interoperability solutions, including electronic signature, intelligent data capture, and workflow automation, primarily in North America and Europe. The company operates through a software-as-a-service (SaaS) business model, offering solutions for secure data exchange to industries like healthcare, financial services, and legal. Consensus Cloud Solutions is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
